name: Doxee S.p.A.
summary: Doxee S.p.A. develops cloud technologies in Italy, the United States, and the Czech Republic. It offers Doxee Document Experience (dX), a customer communications management product for managing business processes related to data transformation and document production, distribution, and archiving; Doxee Paperless Experience (pX) for dematerialization of processes, such as electronic invoicing and legally compliant digital storage; and Doxee Pvideo and Doxee Pweb for digital customer experience. The company serves utilities, telecommunications and media, banking, insurance, travel, and leisure industries, as well as governments. Doxee S.p.A. is headquartered in Modena, Italy.
